name: MoneyGram
description_short: Orlando's MoneyGram location on E Colonial Dr provides check-cashing and money transfer services with extended daily hours.
description_long:
MoneyGram's location at 1201 E Colonial Dr in Orlando, FL operates as a standalone check-cashing store with consistent hours throughout the week. The Orlando branch is open Monday through Sunday from 8 AM to 10 PM, making it accessible for early-morning money transfers and late-evening transactions when many other services have closed.

This Orlando MoneyGram location offers check-cashing, bill payment options, and domestic/international money transfers. Customers can call the location at +1 800-746-7287 for specific service availability or to confirm transaction fees before visiting.

If you live or work in Orlando and need cash urgently, bring a government-issued ID and proof of income for certain services. The extended hours (8 AM–10 PM daily) make this location convenient for people working 9-to-5 schedules who need financial services outside traditional banking hours.
pros: Extensive network of 13,000+ locations across United States for convenient access
Omnichannel service delivery—customers can transact online or in person based on preference
Multiple service types available at single locations: money transfer, check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment
Interactive location finder with map-based search functionality to locate nearest service point
Serves unbanked and underbanked populations who lack traditional banking access
Search flexibility by address, city, state, or ZIP code to find nearby locations
Nationwide money sending and receiving capability across the service network
cons: Website content does not disclose specific fees or pricing for services, making cost comparison difficult
No information provided about transfer speed guarantees, limits, or service terms
Limited detail on service hours, customer service availability, or complaint resolution process
Faces established competition from Western Union and other money transfer services in the same market
Physical location dependency may still be challenging for customers in rural or underserved areas despite 13,000+ location count
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who lack traditional bank accounts and need cash access
People frequently sending money to domestic recipients across different US states
Consumers in urban areas with high MoneyGram location density who prefer in-person transactions
Individuals needing multiple financial services (checks, money orders, bill pay) at single convenient location
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best suited for unbanked/underbanked consumers and those who frequently need to send or receive domestic money transfers, with primary value in their extensive 13,000+ location network. The main caveat is that detailed pricing, service terms, and speed guarantees are not disclosed on the publicly available website content, requiring direct inquiry or further research before committing to their services.
services: Domestic money transfer and sending money nationwide
Money receiving services from other senders
meta_description: Orlando, FL – MoneyGram at 1201 E Colonial Dr. Check-cashing, bill pay & money transfers, 8 AM–10 PM.
